title: windows machine rename machine config flake
body:

https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/actions/runs/27027638409/job/79772780772?pr=28871

seen just once on hyperV but error looks somewhat concerning and more generic? The "atomic" json update fails with `Access is denied`? How could that possibly happen?

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
